onboarding.goalsText: Build Chronova AI startup and prepare for tech placements

goals.title: Prepare for Software Placement
goals.description: Crack the upcoming coding interviews and master CS core concepts.

subtasks.title: Practice DBMS SQL Queries and Joins
Structure behavioral story cards using STAR framework

goals.title: Launch Chronova AI Tech Demo
goals.description: Complete design, server integrations, and pitch-grade demo.

subtasks.title: Code full-stack server endpoints with express
Design the visual AI coach UI view with quick-read swipe cards
Integrate WhatsApp notification layout testing framework

excuseLogs.excuse: I was feeling a bit tired after lunch, will do it tomorrow.
excuseLogs.aiResponse: 😴 Chronova AI Coach says: 'Sleeping off your goals? Your competitors are ordering double shots of espresso right now. Task postponed for the 3rd time!'
excuseLogs.consequence: Pushes your OS mock quiz to night slot, and chips away 3% off your Placement Success Probability.

excuseLogs.excuse: Insta reels were too addictive today, got stuck in a scroll hole.
excuseLogs.aiResponse: 📱 Chronova AI Coach says: 'Our dashboard shows you are scrolling infinitely. No amount of scrolling can bring back lost time. Breaking news: Your dream job's salary just refused to load.'
excuseLogs.consequence: Increases Delay Risk from 5% to 9% for the launch demo goal.

notifications.title: 🚨 Alert from Future You
notifications.message: Breaking News: Your deadline refused to move. Put down the scroll and pick up the IDE.
notifications.whatsappTemplate: Hey User! 🚀 Chronova reminder: Your deadline is approaching faster than your salary. OS Mock Quiz is awaiting your attention. Reply with 'RECOVER' to shrink the delay risk!
notifications.emailTemplate:
Subject: Chronova Coached Digest - Your future self has concerns...

Hi User,

You logged 2 postponements today. Your placements success probability is dropping to 78%. We suggest triggering Chronova Recovery Mode immediately in your dashboard.
notifications.pushChannel: Browser Popup: Scroll loop detected. Work progress: 0%.

notifications.title: 💡 AI Recalibration complete
notifications.message: Chronova has compressed 3 subtasks to recover work hours safely.
notifications.whatsappTemplate: Chronova Recovery Mode Activated. We skipped the 30min leisure slot and combined DBMS review directly with DSA review. Let's do this!
notifications.emailTemplate:
Subject: Chronova AI Recovery Plan Success!

Your tasks have been reprioritized. We combined software interview preparations into high-impact sprint cycles.
notifications.pushChannel: Chronova Recovery: OS mock review rearranged to 15:00.

goals.title: make pasta
goals.description: Targeting deadline on 2026-06-27. Created from your onboarding profile.

excuseLogs.aiResponse: Refusing to make pasta because you 'don't feel like eating' is like declining your salary because you don't feel like opening your banking app. You are overdrafting on your future energy reserves, so stop the emotional bankruptcy and go boil the water before your motivation flatlines.
excuseLogs.consequence: You will inevitably end up starving at midnight, staring regretfully into an empty fridge before resorting to panic-eating raw block cheese over the sink.

notifications.title: ⚠️ High Delay Warning
notifications.message: Refusing to make pasta because you 'don't feel like eating' is like declining your salary because you don't feel like opening your banking app. You are overdrafting on your future energy reserves, so stop the emotional bankruptcy and go boil the water before your motivation flatlines.
notifications.emailTemplate:
Subject: Excuse Logged & Success Rate Dropping - Chronova

Hi shivani,

You gave an excuse for "Task".

Excuse: "dont feel like eating it"
Consequence: You will inevitably end up starving at midnight, staring regretfully into an empty fridge before resorting to panic-eating raw block cheese over the sink.

Let's beat this procrastination cycle step-by-step.
notifications.pushChannel: Browser Push: Consequence simulation has updated. Risk is RED.

notifications.title: 🙏🏽 Welcome to Chronova!
notifications.message: No active goals yet. Click 'Add Custom Goal' above or complete onboarding to schedule your first milestone.
